text_preview:
SCADA Standards Volume 3 of 3 
Figure 59 Removing an Existing User 
HFC AWTP Master Plan 
Howard F. Curren AWTP 
SCADA Standards - HMI and OIT 
Volume 3 of 3 
February 2025 
82
artifact_summary: This document page features a screenshot of a software interface titled 'Security Settings' used for managing user accounts. It specifically illustrates the 'Deleting User' function within the User Security Settings window.
artifact_key_elements: User dropdown list (Manager, Operator1, Operator2, admin)
artifact_blurb: The image displays a software interface for 'Security Settings' focused on the 'Deleting User' task. A dropdown menu lists available accounts including Manager, Operator1, Operator2, and admin, with Operator1 currently selected next to a Delete button. This visual aid, labeled Figure 59 Removing an Existing User, demonstrates the steps to remove a specific user account from the system.
